name: insurance brokers managing 5–15 policies/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 policies/month, missed policy renewals cause client dissatisfaction. We send automated reminders instead of manual tracking of renewal dates.
problem_solved: missed policy renewals leading to client dissatisfaction
